headline: CodeRabbit Names Enterprise Sales Veteran Matthew Mulqueen as Chief Revenue Officer to Expand Global GTM Operations
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 02, 2026--CodeRabbit, the pioneer in AI-native code review, today announced the appointment of Matthew Mulqueen as Chief Revenue Officer. Reporting to CEO Harjot Gill, Mulqueen will lead CodeRabbit’s global go-to-market strategy, encompassing sales, marketing, and customer success as the company continues its rapid enterprise expansion.

headline: Brokers Suggest Investing in Datadog (DDOG): Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Datadog (DDOG) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Datadog (DDOG) After Its Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Datadog is priced for opportunity or already reflects high expectations, especially after its recent share price moves. The stock last closed at US$118.67, with returns of 6.8% over 30 days, 16.7% over 1 year, and 79.5% over 3 years, while the year-to-date return is an 11.3% decline. Recent headlines have focused on Datadog's position in observability and cloud monitoring, as well as its role in supporting large-scale software and infrastructure...
